name: criminal_justice_licensing_backlog_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A jury pool algorithm excluded an entire census tract; plaintiffs’ counsel is filing for mistrial if empanelment proceeds. In Criminal Justice, the situation tagged internally around criminal justice licensing backlog redwood tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Priya Chandra
agents.identity: I am Priya Chandra, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Justice. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Kim
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kim, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Justice. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Chandra must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Priya Chandra do?
